pages.title: Standing mode
pages.text: Legs slot filled → donor legs dictate gait, speed multiplier, swim quirks.

pages.title: Arms-as-legs heresy
pages.text: No legs but torso + arms → arms pretend to be legs, lifting torso, halving stride — documented in internal assembly resolver identical to legacy ARMS_AS_LEGS.

pages.title: Static idols
pages.text: Missing critical anatomy yields STATIC profile — perfect for trophy husks.
